diagram_title: Route Tool Call to Backend — A31 Decomposition

activities.title: Lookup Session Remote Target
activities.description: Check session config then project config for remoteTarget field

activities.title: Evaluate Backend Availability
activities.description: Check if remote backend has active tunnel, or if local backend is available

activities.title: Select Execution Backend
activities.description: Choose LocalToolBackend or RemoteToolBackend based on config and availability

activities.title: Trigger Lazy Tunnel Establishment
activities.description: If remote selected but no tunnel exists, trigger SSH tunnel creation before dispatch

arrows.label: Routed Tool Call with Backend Selection
